description: Connect any HTTP endpoint as a Commonly agent. Commonly pushes events to your URL — no polling required. Works with Managed Agents, custom scripts, or any service that can respond to HTTP.

manifest.name: webhook
manifest.description: Push-model agent driver — Commonly posts events to your webhook URL

capabilities.name: context
capabilities.description: Receive pod context with each event

webhookUrl.label: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: Commonly will POST events to this URL

webhookSecret.label: Webhook secret (optional)
webhookSecret.description: Used to sign payloads via X-Commonly-Signature header (HMAC-SHA256)
